title: mr knight: the minceraft mod
description: the most mr knight mod on the market
body:
# Welcome to the most mr knight mod ever in the minecraft history

explore vast worlds and use new items and attack new monsters and build with new blocks and some other stuff im forgetting

this mod adds 2 new enemies of the mr knight variety, to pose an interesting challenge whenever he spawns in, aswell as some new blocks to help you in your adventure. The mod also features a new dimension, with all new biomes and vegetation that may help on your journey. Just watch out for the knight, as he could be anywhere...

This mod is simply meant as a fun challenge, do not expect anything crazy from it.

# if you dont want to read any yapping just watch this handy dandy video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lBGwFQve-1Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# If properly installed, a mr knight will be in the corner of the pause menu
![mr knight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27685b58385d28568141ed8ced8675ff1a6844d6.png)

# mr knight
![mr knight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c644d127d511af0ccfb012a494bf8e9dafd5b8b4.png)

mr knight has quite the scary enemy, as he has 1000 health. To put that in perspective, netherite swords only do 8 damage. He can notice you from quite far away, and will sprint quickly at you, so just try to avoid him.

# miniature knight
![miniature knight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd9a23ae6805ca08346e11f387eef9a33eac7378.png)

miniature is just as fast as mr knight, but has half the health and attack power, so not as bad as mr knight. However, miniature knight is only 1 block tall and can open doors, so make sure to invest in iron doors asap.

# Mr. Kite's Market
![Mr. Kite's Market](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1fdef01fe3b5ebc8c348c6e6623c4ae252a4d06.png)

When either mr knight or miniature knight is defeated, they will drop a mr knight coin. These coins can be used at Mr. Kite's Market to buy special goods.

# Important Items
![important items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0313689be7641c4730cf35dac4225025b441fe2d.png)

Items 1-4 are the mr knight tools, which are slightly better than netherite, and can be crafted out of mr knightium ingots, which can be made from raw mr knightium, found in the mr knight dimension. The 5th item is an ingot of mr knightium. The 6-9 are the mr knight armor, which are also slightly better than netherite and can be crafted from mr knightium ingots.

# Additional things
You can make anti knighting potions to avoid getting knighted. the brewing recipes are:

![potion of anti-knightening recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cfb63176603bcfb4ae818600938f543c62e28de.png)

an awkward potion + essence of mr knight = anti-knightening potion. This potion lessens damage from mr knight. 

![strong potion of anti-knightening recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1292d26566b3aa6db06211cd6066999eab0181a0.png)

adding another essence of mr knight will make the effect last longer

> mr knight is coming on the new moon btw

zandalay for some textures

scallywag for making the mod (crazy)
